allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add cinematic hero, bento grid, and animated UI components

- HeroCinematic: split layout with word reveal, marquee strip, floating orbs and parallax scroll
- BentoProductGrid: asymmetric bento layout \(hero 2×2 + small cards\) with animated spotlight border that follows cursor
- SectionHeading: reusable animated title with word reveal and gradient accent
- globals.css: add @property conic-border, glass variants, shadow utilities and word-up keyframe
- page.tsx: wire up new components, keep carousel on mobile

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/germainlefranc/Documents/PWA/sostn commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add Vercel Analytics and Speed Insights

- Install @vercel/analytics and @vercel/speed-insights
- Integrate <Analytics /> and <SpeedInsights /> in root layout

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/germainlefranc/Documents/PWA/sostn commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add scroll progress bar and premium 404 page

- ScrollProgressBar: fixed 2px gradient bar \(turquoise→orange\) with spring physics, z-index above navbar
- [locale]/not-found.tsx: interactive dot grid \(canvas + mouse tracking\), glitch 404 number \(CSS clip-path\), ambient glow blobs, FR/EN CTAs
- [locale]/layout.tsx: integrate ScrollProgressBar

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/germainlefranc/Documents/PWA/sostn commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add count-up animation on Hero stats

- hooks/useCountUp.ts: custom hook with requestAnimationFrame + expo-out easing, triggers once on viewport entry
- Hero.tsx: StatCard component uses useInView \(Framer Motion\) to start count-up when scrolled into view, staggered entry \(delay: index * 0.08s\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/germainlefranc/Documents/PWA/sostn commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Replace Inter/Space Grotesk with Syne/DM Sans

- layout.tsx: swap Google Fonts URL → Syne \(400–800\) + DM Sans \(300–700 + italic\)
- globals.css: update --font-display \(Syne\) and --font-body \(DM Sans\), recalibrate letter-spacing for Syne''s natural condensation, bump h1 to weight 800 / h2 to 700
- not-found.tsx: update hardcoded fontFamily inline styles

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
